name: Phase 2 — Order Intake Tool (AI extracts order → Backend)

nodes.name: Webhook — Extract Order
nodes.notes: Called by the AI Agent in phase1-ai-responder as a Tool when it detects an order intent. Payload: { chatId, conversationText }

options.systemMessage:
You are an order extraction assistant. Extract the order details from the conversation and return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown, no explanation) with these fields:
{
  "clientName": string,
  "clientPhone": string (derived from chatId, strip @c.us),
  "items": [ { "name": string, "qty": number, "price": number } ],
  "deliveryDate": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "notes": string
}
If a field cannot be determined, use null. Price should be 0 if unknown.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, orderId: $json._id, message: `Pesanan berhasil dicatat! ID: ${$json._id}. Tanggal pengiriman: ${$json.deliveryDate?.slice(0,10) ?? '-'}` } }}

meta.description: Sub-workflow called by the AI Agent (as a Tool) when it detects order intent. Extracts structured order data with LLM and POSTs to the Hapi backend. Set BACKEND_BASE_URL and BACKEND_API_KEY as n8n environment variables.
